traits.name: Teleport
traits.text: Graz'zt teleports, along with any equipment he is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space he can see.

traits.name: Negate Spell {@recharge 5} (reaction)
traits.text: Graz'zt tries to interrupt a spell he sees a creature casting within 60 feet of him. If the spell is 3rd level or lower, the spell fails and has no effect. If the spell is 4th level or higher, Graz'zt makes a Charisma check against a DC of 10 + the spell's level. On a success, the spell fails and has no effect.

traits.name: Change Shape (bonus)
traits.text: Graz'zt transforms into a form that resembles a Medium Humanoid or back into his true form. Aside from his size, his statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment he is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.text: If Graz'zt fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: Graz'zt has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
